Title: Handwritten Floral Design Cream & Burgundy Crewneck T-Shirt
Description:
Showcase your artistic side with this unique, personalized crewneck t-shirt. Featuring a beautiful, hand-drawn floral botanical design in soft cream and rich burgundy tones, this tee makes a subtle yet striking fashion statement.

The delicate, vintage-inspired artwork printed directly onto the fabric adds a touch of handmade elegance to your casual wardrobe. It is designed for those who appreciate bespoke art and unique styles.

  • Soft Comfort: Crafted from premium cotton blend fabric, ensuring all-day comfort and breathability.
  • Versatile Style: Perfect for casual outings, brunches, or creative gatherings. Pair it with jeans or skirts for a stylish look.
  • Gift Idea: Makes an excellent, thoughtful gift for art lovers, students, or anyone who appreciates botanical prints and vintage aesthetics.

Materials & Care: Machine wash cold, inside-out, with like colors. Tumble dry low. We recommend washing promptly to preserve the vibrant print and fabric integrity.
